Algorithm Methodology

Powered by Weighted K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN). Computes N-dimensional Euclidean distance against all historical players dynamically based on 10 standardized positional Z-Scores.

Engineered by @Shauncore

Head-to-Head Positional Z-Scores
